texto: The inextinguishable lesbian spark. You've surely heard about it? The one that was first ignited at Lesbos, because Sappho was so sad every time a young woman left the academy that she wrote her a poem. Fancy being sad because someone leaves! Perverted, that's what I call it. Don't you?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Gerd Brantenberg que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “The inextinguishable lesbian spark. You've surely heard about it? The one that was first ignited …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, lesbian, sappho, com foco em sappho e sarcasm.
